options: Keep the current [id] route until broader type and import drift is repaired.
Rename to [wrapId] during a dedicated route and link migration pass.
open_decisions.impact: Affects route files, route types, links, tests, and prompt scope.

open_decisions.topic: Current versus future domain file layout
options: Continue implementing within current lib/actions.* and lib/fetchers.* surfaces.
Perform a structural migration to lib/catalog/** and lib/visualizer/** as a dedicated refactor.
open_decisions.impact: Affects prompt scope, touched paths, and whether future-oriented specs are implemented literally or adapted.

resolved_decisions.resolution: Treat Cloudinary-backed durable URLs and the Hugging Face adapter plus deterministic fallback as the live implementation model for upcoming work.
resolved_decisions.rationale: That is what the current code already implements, so future work should extend it rather than reintroduce speculative storage or provider abstractions.

resolved_decisions.resolution: Mark the program as conditional_ready rather than fully ready.
resolved_decisions.rationale: Prisma validates, but lint, typecheck, and tests are not green. The next agent must inherit that reality explicitly.
